name: Free
description: Kickstart your career with our completely free plan. Perfect for students, fresh graduates, and beginners who want a clean, professional resume without spending anything. Access essential tools to create your first resume quickly and hassle-free.

name: Starter
description: Ideal for freelancers and early-career professionals who need more options and better presentation. Unlock a larger collection of templates and essential export formats to help your resume stand out from the crowd.

name: Pro
description: Our most popular choice for serious job seekers and professionals. Get advanced tools to build highly optimized, recruiter-friendly resumes that successfully pass Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and grab attention.

name: Premium
description: Experience the full power of AI to create standout resumes faster. Designed for ambitious job seekers who want premium quality, smart suggestions, and every possible edge in today's competitive job market.

name: Team
description: Perfect for small teams, recruitment agencies, and companies that need to handle multiple resumes efficiently. Collaborate easily, maintain consistent branding, and streamline resume creation across your organization.

name: Yearly Pro
description: Get all Pro plan features with big savings through annual billing. Great for users serious about long-term career development who want maximum value and uninterrupted access with extra benefits.

name: Lifetime
description: Make a one-time payment and enjoy unlimited access forever. The smartest choice for professionals who want complete freedom from subscriptions while still receiving all future updates and new features.

name: Enterprise
description: Custom solutions built for large organizations, enterprises, and educational institutions. Enjoy tailored integrations, dedicated support, top-tier security, and scalable features designed to match your organization's specific needs.

name: Student
description: Specially designed for current students and recent graduates on a tight budget. Get access to professional resume tools at a significant discount while enjoying advanced features to help you secure your first job or internship.
